The '''desert sport skiff''' was a small repulsor sport-craft, suitable for short trips and stunts. It came standard with turbo thrusters and mid-sized repulsors, though the thrust capacity was limited to 150 km per hour, for safety reasons.

[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] owned one of these vehicles during his youth on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], where he bought it at a cheap price from a group of [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] traders. Subsequently, he and [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs Darklighter]] heavily modified the skiff, adding an afterburner to the meglifts and three high powered blasters for defense. Luke was able to achieve a top speed of 400 km per hour, far exceeding the manufacturer's limit.<ref name="POTF Toy" />

==Behind the scenes==
The desert sport skiff first appeared as a vehicle in the [[Star Wars: The Power of the Force (1995 toy line)|''Star Wars: The Power of the Force'']] toy line in [[July]] [[1996]], packaged with Luke Skywalker.<ref name="AFF">''[[Star Wars: The Action Figure Archive]]''</ref> The toy was later released as a vehicle used by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] in the [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (toy line)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'']] toy line.<ref name="CW Toy">{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: The Clone Wars (toy line)|pack=Desert Skiff with Anakin Skywalker|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/TCWDLXDesertSkiff-Anakin.asp}}</ref>
